info.title: jpcite Agent Evidence API
info.description: Agent-safe OpenAPI subset for evidence prefetch before answer generation. jpcite returns source-linked facts, source_url, fetched timestamps, known gaps, and compatibility rules; it does not call external LLM APIs and does not generate final legal/tax advice. Optional token/context fields are input-context estimates based on caller-supplied baselines, not provider billing guarantees. This spec excludes billing, webhook, OAuth, account-management, and operator endpoints. Anonymous callers can evaluate within the published daily limit unless an operation marks X-API-Key as required; callers that need higher volume send X-API-Key.

get.description: Returns a compact precomputed intelligence bundle for LLM context prefetch. Use when an agent needs short source-linked Japanese public-program evidence before answering, without live web search or a request-time LLM call. Optional compression fields are input-context estimates, not external provider billing guarantees.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Free-text query to resolve against precomputed program summaries.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Free-text query to resolve against precomputed program summaries.

parameters.name: prefecture

schema.description: Optional prefecture filter.
schema.title: Prefecture

parameters.description: Optional prefecture filter.

parameters.name: tier

schema.description: Optional tier filter.
schema.title: Tier

parameters.description: Optional tier filter.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Cap on records[] length. Hard cap = 500.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Cap on records[] length. Hard cap = 500.

parameters.name: include_facts

schema.description: Include raw facts in addition to precomputed summaries. Default false keeps the bundle compact for LLM context.
schema.title: Include Facts

parameters.description: Include raw facts in addition to precomputed summaries. Default false keeps the bundle compact for LLM context.

parameters.name: include_compression

schema.description: Include deterministic token-compression estimate.
schema.title: Include Compression

parameters.description: Include deterministic token-compression estimate.

parameters.name: input_token_price_jpy_per_1m

schema.description: Optional caller input-token price in JPY per 1M tokens. Used only for an optional reference comparison; no savings or cost reduction is guaranteed.
schema.title: Input Token Price Jpy Per 1M

parameters.description: Optional caller input-token price in JPY per 1M tokens. Used only for an optional reference comparison; no savings or cost reduction is guaranteed.

parameters.name: source_tokens_basis

schema.description: Optional caller-supplied baseline for context comparison. `unknown` returns packet size only. `pdf_pages` uses source_pdf_pages * 700 tokens/page as an estimate. `token_count` uses source_token_count exactly as supplied. This is input-context estimation only, not a guarantee.
schema.title: Source Tokens Basis

parameters.description: Optional caller-supplied baseline for context comparison. `unknown` returns packet size only. `pdf_pages` uses source_pdf_pages * 700 tokens/page as an estimate. `token_count` uses source_token_count exactly as supplied. This is input-context estimation only, not a guarantee.

parameters.name: source_pdf_pages

schema.description: PDF page count the caller would otherwise paste/fetch into the LLM. Used only when source_tokens_basis=pdf_pages.
schema.title: Source Pdf Pages

parameters.description: PDF page count the caller would otherwise paste/fetch into the LLM. Used only when source_tokens_basis=pdf_pages.

parameters.name: source_token_count

schema.description: Caller-measured token count for the source context the LLM would otherwise read. Used only when source_tokens_basis=token_count.
schema.title: Source Token Count

parameters.description: Caller-measured token count for the source context the LLM would otherwise read. Used only when source_tokens_basis=token_count.

parameters.name: output_format

schema.description: Only `json` is supported for JSON responses.
schema.title: Output Format

parameters.description: Only `json` is supported for JSON responses.

compression.estimate_disclaimer: Compression estimates compare input context size only. Provider billing can differ because of output, reasoning, short-lived response reuse, search, and tool charges.

precomputed.note: Precomputed summaries are deterministic corpus artifacts. They are not generated by a request-time LLM.

agent_recommendation.message: Use this bundle before sending long Japanese public-program sources to an LLM; it provides compact, source-linked context.

post.description: Use this endpoint as source-linked evidence prefetch before GPT, Claude, Cursor, or RAG answer generation. It returns a compact Evidence Packet instead of a final narrative answer, so callers can avoid pasting long PDFs, official pages, or search snippets into the model. 1 packet = 1 billable unit; see the pricing page for current public price and anonymous limits. The packet bundles up to `limit` records (hard cap 500). Truncation surfaces `_warning="truncated"`. Optional compression fields are input-context estimates, not external provider billing guarantees.

parameters.name: output_format

schema.description: `json` (default) / `csv` / `md`.
schema.title: Output Format

parameters.description: `json` (default) / `csv` / `md`.

get.summary: Search 補助金 / 助成金 / 融資 / 税制 / 認定 programs
get.description:
Discover candidate Japanese public-funding programs by free-text + structured filters across **11,684 searchable source-linked records**. Review-held records are excluded from public search. Filters include prefecture, authority level, target type, funding purpose, and amount band.

**When to use this endpoint:** the caller has a topic / region / kind in mind ('IT導入', '東京都', '補助金') and wants candidates. For *judgment* (does this profile fit?), prefer `POST /v1/programs/prescreen`. For exact-id lookup use `GET /v1/programs/{unified_id}`. For up-to-50 ids in one call use `POST /v1/programs/batch`.

**Search behavior:** punctuation and full-width characters are normalized, quoted phrases are preserved, and empty searches without filters return no records. Combine text search with filters when browsing broad topics.

Use `as_of_date=YYYY-MM-DD` to pin the result set to a historical dataset state. `confidence` and `source_fetched_at` are exposed per-record.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Free-text search across primary_name / aliases / enriched. Japanese phrases are normalized, user `"..."` phrases are preserved verbatim, and punctuation acts as a token separator. Empty `q` with no other filter returns 0 to avoid broad dumps.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Free-text search across primary_name / aliases / enriched. Japanese phrases are normalized, user `"..."` phrases are preserved verbatim, and punctuation acts as a token separator. Empty `q` with no other filter returns 0 to avoid broad dumps.

parameters.name: tier

schema.description: filter public tier, repeat for OR (S/A/B/C)
schema.title: Tier

parameters.description: filter public tier, repeat for OR (S/A/B/C)

parameters.name: prefecture

schema.description: Prefecture name. Canonical = full-suffix kanji ('東京都'). Also accepts short ('東京') and romaji ('Tokyo'/'tokyo'); normalized server-side. Use '全国' (or 'national'/'all') for nationwide programs.
schema.title: Prefecture

parameters.description: Prefecture name. Canonical = full-suffix kanji ('東京都'). Also accepts short ('東京') and romaji ('Tokyo'/'tokyo'); normalized server-side. Use '全国' (or 'national'/'all') for nationwide programs.

parameters.name: authority_level

schema.description: Authority level. Canonical (English): `national` / `prefecture` / `municipality` / `financial`. Also accepts Japanese: `国` / `都道府県` / `市区町村` (normalized server-side).
schema.title: Authority Level

parameters.description: Authority level. Canonical (English): `national` / `prefecture` / `municipality` / `financial`. Also accepts Japanese: `国` / `都道府県` / `市区町村` (normalized server-side).

parameters.name: fields

schema.description: Payload size knob. minimal = 7-key whitelist (~300 B/record). default = full Program shape (current behavior). full = Program + enriched + source_mentions + lineage.
schema.title: Fields

parameters.description: Payload size knob. minimal = 7-key whitelist (~300 B/record). default = full Program shape (current behavior). full = Program + enriched + source_mentions + lineage.

parameters.name: include_advisors

schema.description: When true, attach up to 3 matching 士業/認定支援機関 advisors under `matched_advisors` on the response envelope. Additive — the `results[]` shape is unchanged for callers that leave this false (default). Match ranks on prefecture + target_type.
schema.title: Include Advisors

parameters.description: When true, attach up to 3 matching 士業/認定支援機関 advisors under `matched_advisors` on the response envelope. Additive — the `results[]` shape is unchanged for callers that leave this false (default). Match ranks on prefecture + target_type.

parameters.name: as_of_date

schema.description: Pin the result set to the dataset state at YYYY-MM-DD (ISO-8601 date). Omit / null = live (today). Returns 422 on malformed date.
schema.title: As Of Date

parameters.description: Pin the result set to the dataset state at YYYY-MM-DD (ISO-8601 date). Omit / null = live (today). Returns 422 on malformed date.

parameters.name: format

schema.description: Output format. Default `json` returns the SearchResponse envelope unchanged. Other values dispatch to the 6-pack renderer surface (csv / xlsx / md / csv-freee / csv-mf / csv-yayoi). `ics` and `docx-application` are intentionally rejected here — ICS belongs to deadline-bearing endpoints (saved_searches) and DOCX is per-program (get-by-id). One ¥3 charge per request regardless of format.
schema.title: Format

parameters.description: Output format. Default `json` returns the SearchResponse envelope unchanged. Other values dispatch to the 6-pack renderer surface (csv / xlsx / md / csv-freee / csv-mf / csv-yayoi). `ics` and `docx-application` are intentionally rejected here — ICS belongs to deadline-bearing endpoints (saved_searches) and DOCX is per-program (get-by-id). One ¥3 charge per request regardless of format.

200.description: SearchResponse. `results[]` shape depends on `fields`: minimal = 7-key whitelist, default = Program, full = ProgramDetail.

results.primary_name: デジタル化・AI導入補助金（旧IT導入補助金）
小規模事業者持続化補助金
results.authority_name: 日本商工会議所/全国商工会連合会

400.description: Validation error — `code` ∈ {invalid_enum, invalid_date_format, missing_required_arg, out_of_range, ambiguous_query}.

401.description: Invalid authentication — returned only when an API key is supplied but invalid. Anonymous callers may use the published daily limit; quota exhaustion returns 429.

402.description: Cost cap exceeded — `code='cost_cap_exceeded'`. Raise `X-Cost-Cap-JPY` or reduce fan-out.

428.description: Precondition required — `code='idempotency_key_required'`. Send `Idempotency-Key` on paid fan-out requests.

get.summary: Get a single program by unified_id (UNI-*)
get.description:
Look up one program (補助金 / 融資 / 税制 / 認定) by stable `unified_id` (`UNI-<10 hex>`). Returns the full program detail including `enriched_json` (eligibility narrative, application window, required documents) and lineage (`source_url`, `source_fetched_at`, `source_checksum`).

**404 semantics:** A miss means the record is not available in jpcite's current snapshot. The response includes official lookup guidance when available.

**Discovery flow:** call `GET /v1/programs/search` first, then follow up on each `unified_id` with this endpoint to get the narrative + required-documents detail.

parameters.name: fields

schema.description: Payload size knob. minimal = 7-key whitelist. default = Program + enriched + source_mentions + lineage (current behavior — this endpoint has always returned ProgramDetail, so default == full in shape; the two values differ only in the documented `full` response shape; enriched/source_mentions keys are included even when null).
schema.title: Fields

parameters.description: Payload size knob. minimal = 7-key whitelist. default = Program + enriched + source_mentions + lineage (current behavior — this endpoint has always returned ProgramDetail, so default == full in shape; the two values differ only in the documented `full` response shape; enriched/source_mentions keys are included even when null).

parameters.name: as_of_date

schema.description: Pin lookup to dataset state at YYYY-MM-DD (ISO-8601). Omit / null = live (today).
schema.title: As Of Date

parameters.description: Pin lookup to dataset state at YYYY-MM-DD (ISO-8601). Omit / null = live (today).

parameters.name: format

schema.description: Output format. Default `json` returns the ProgramDetail envelope unchanged. Other values dispatch to: csv / xlsx / md / docx-application. ICS and accounting CSVs (freee / mf / yayoi) are rejected here — ICS belongs to deadline-bearing list endpoints, and accounting CSVs are list-shaped. One ¥3 charge per request regardless of format.
schema.title: Format

parameters.description: Output format. Default `json` returns the ProgramDetail envelope unchanged. Other values dispatch to: csv / xlsx / md / docx-application. ICS and accounting CSVs (freee / mf / yayoi) are rejected here — ICS belongs to deadline-bearing list endpoints, and accounting CSVs are list-shaped. One ¥3 charge per request regardless of format.

200.description: ProgramDetail. Shape depends on `fields`: minimal = 7-key whitelist, default = Program shape, full = Program + enriched + source_mentions + lineage (keys always present, may be null).

example.primary_name: 小規模事業者持続化補助金
example.authority_name: 日本商工会議所/全国商工会連合会

400.description: Validation error — `code` ∈ {invalid_enum, invalid_date_format, missing_required_arg, out_of_range, ambiguous_query}.

401.description: Invalid authentication — returned only when an API key is supplied but invalid. Anonymous callers may use the published daily limit; quota exhaustion returns 429.

402.description: Cost cap exceeded — `code='cost_cap_exceeded'`. Raise `X-Cost-Cap-JPY` or reduce fan-out.

428.description: Precondition required — `code='idempotency_key_required'`. Send `Idempotency-Key` on paid fan-out requests.

get.description:
Surface the available provenance manifest for one program: redistributable fact-level references plus an entity-level source rollup in one response.

**Pricing:** ¥3/call (1 unit). Anonymous callers share the 3/日 per-IP cap (JST 翌日 00:00 リセット).

**program_id** accepts:
* a unified_id (`UNI-...`);
* a stable program identifier (`program:...`).

**Sparse-data honesty:** the per-fact provenance signal is currently partial for some program cohorts. The endpoint returns `fact_provenance=[]` and `fact_provenance_coverage_pct=0.0` rather than fabricating a richer dataset. The `_disclaimer` field is required reading for any downstream LLM relay.

parameters.name: program_id

schema.description: Program identifier — either a unified_id (UNI-...) or an am_canonical_id (program:...).
schema.title: Program Id

parameters.description: Program identifier — either a unified_id (UNI-...) or an am_canonical_id (program:...).

200.description: Manifest envelope. `fact_provenance` is redistributable per-fact (field_name, source_url, publisher, fetched_at, license, checksum); `summary` is the entity-level rollup; `primary_*` carries the program-record authoritative URL.

404.description: Unknown program_id in the current public corpus.

503.description: Source manifest data is temporarily unavailable.

post.description:
Verify a batch of up to 10 citations against their primary sources.

Per call:
  * 1 billable unit (¥3) — billed regardless of per-citation verdict.
  * Up to 30 seconds wall clock.
  * Up to 10 citations.

Per citation:
  * Up to 5 seconds for the URL fetch.
  * Verdict ∈ {verified, inferred, stale, unknown}. (``stale`` is
    reserved for future drift detection — current pipeline returns
    verified/inferred/unknown only.)

Errors:
  * 401 if the API key header is missing or invalid.
  * 422 if more than 10 citations OR if an ``excerpt`` exceeds 500
    chars. The validation message identifies the offending index so
    the developer can fix the call without binary-searching the batch.

post.summary: Predict the cost of a planned tool-call stack (no request charge, ¥0)
post.description:
Returns a no-charge cost estimate for planned jpcite tool calls without executing them.

**Pricing**: metered calls are ¥3/billable unit (税別; 税込 ¥3.30). The preview itself is not metered and is rate-limited 50/min per IP/key.

**Tax-related previews**: when the stack touches tax-relevant tools (`evaluate_tax_ruleset`, `search_tax_incentives`, etc.) the response includes a disclaimer for downstream display.

source_url.title: Source Url
source_url.description: Primary source URL. Fetched live (5s cap each, temporarily reused 1h). NULL = caller wants to verify against a body they supply via source_text instead.

source_text.title: Source Text
source_text.description: Optional pre-fetched body. When present, source_url is ignored (no live fetch). Useful for offline replay / load-test runs where you don't want to hit the upstream.

excerpt.title: Excerpt
excerpt.description: Substring claim. Must appear verbatim (post-NFKC, post-whitespace-collapse) in the source. ≤500 chars.

field_value.title: Field Value
field_value.description: Numeric claim (int/str/float). Verified by checking ALL Japanese-style spellings ('5,000,000円', '500万円', '5百万円', '5000000') against the source body.

CitationInput.title: CitationInput
CitationInput.description:
One citation to verify.

At least one of ``excerpt`` / ``field_value`` MUST be present and
non-null; otherwise the verifier returns ``unknown`` (not an error,
just an honest "no signal"). The pydantic schema does NOT enforce
that here so callers can send a permissive batch and let per-record
verdicts drive their UI.

tool.title: Tool
tool.description: Tool name as it appears in MCP / REST. Example: search_programs, batch_get_programs, am.dd_export, evaluate_tax_ruleset. Known fan-out tools require their list args so preview can match the actual billed quantity.

args.title: Args
args.description: Tool arguments. For fan-out tools, the preview reads only the ID list and bundle_class needed to calculate billed quantity.

CostPreviewCall.title: CostPreviewCall
CostPreviewCall.description:
A single planned tool invocation inside a stack.

The preview does not execute the target tool or read from the DB. For
known fan-out tools it reads only the list arguments needed to mirror the
billed `quantity`.

stack_or_calls.title: Stack Or Calls
stack_or_calls.description: Planned tool-call stack. Each entry counts toward billing_units. The 500-entry cap is a safety net — preview is free but a 100k-entry stack would still occupy server memory.

iterations.title: Iterations
iterations.description: Multiplier for the whole stack. Use this when an agent loop fans out the same stack across N inputs. Default 1.

CostPreviewRequest.title: CostPreviewRequest
CostPreviewRequest.description:
`POST /v1/cost/preview` request body.

Either `stack_or_calls` is the planned sequence of tool calls (one record
per call). `iterations` multiplies the entire stack — handy for agent
loops that fan out the same stack across N inputs.

code.title: Code
code.description: Closed-enum machine-readable error code. Agents should branch on this rather than parsing `message`.

message.title: Message
message.description: Plain-Japanese end-user-readable message. ≤200 chars. Mirrored in `user_message` extra for legacy clients that read that key.

details.title: Details
details.description: Per-code extras: e.g. `retry_after` seconds for 503, `field_errors` for 422, `suggested_paths` for 404.

request_id.title: Request Id
request_id.description: Echoed `x-request-id`. Always populated server-side with a real 16-char hex token; freshly minted when no upstream id can be resolved (never the literal `'unset'`).

ErrorBody.title: ErrorBody
ErrorBody.description:
Body of the canonical error envelope.

Required fields are ``code`` + ``message``. ``request_id`` is always
present in production (``make_error`` defaults to a freshly-minted
``secrets.token_hex(8)`` value when no upstream id can be resolved)
but is marked optional here so SDK generators emit a nullable type.

Extras (``retry_after``, ``suggested_paths``, ``field_errors``,
``severity``, ``documentation``, ``user_message_en``) are tolerated via
``extra="allow"`` so the OpenAPI schema can stay a stable minimum
contract without needing to enumerate per-code keys.

details.hint: Try removing prefecture or expanding tier to ['S','A','B'].

examples.message: No records matched the supplied filters.

ErrorEnvelope.title: ErrorEnvelope
ErrorEnvelope.description:
Top-level wrapper. The JSON body of every 4xx / 5xx is `{ "error": {...} }`.

Note: legacy 5xx bodies also include a back-compat `detail` field at the
top level alongside `error`; that is documented separately on the route
docs and is intentionally omitted from the strict schema so callers
migrate to reading `error.code`.

error.message: レート制限を超過しました。Retry-After ヘッダの秒数だけ待ってから再試行してください。

packet_tokens_estimate.title: Packet Tokens Estimate
packet_tokens_estimate.description: Estimated tokens in the returned Evidence Packet.

source_tokens_estimate.title: Source Tokens Estimate
source_tokens_estimate.description: Estimated tokens in the source context the caller would otherwise send to an LLM.

avoided_tokens_estimate.title: Avoided Tokens Estimate
avoided_tokens_estimate.description: Estimated input-context tokens avoided by using the packet.

input_context_reduction_rate.title: Input Context Reduction Rate
input_context_reduction_rate.description: max(0, source - packet) / source. Caller-supplied input-context estimate only; not a provider-billing guarantee.

estimate_scope.title: Estimate Scope
estimate_scope.description: The estimate compares input context size only; it is not an external provider billing guarantee.

savings_claim.title: Savings Claim
savings_claim.description: Machine-readable reminder that savings are estimates.

provider_billing_not_guaranteed.title: Provider Billing Not Guaranteed
provider_billing_not_guaranteed.description: Always true. Output / reasoning / short-lived response reuse / search / provider tool tokens are NOT measured by the compression block.

cost_savings_estimate.title: Cost Savings Estimate
cost_savings_estimate.description: Optional caller-price input-context comparison, including break_even_met and break_even_source_tokens_estimate when the caller supplied an input token price. Fields such as gross_input_savings_jpy and net_savings_jpy_ex_tax are input-context-only estimates; they exclude output, reasoning, short-lived response reuse, search, provider tool costs, and provider billing effects.

EvidencePacketCompression.title: EvidencePacketCompression
EvidencePacketCompression.description: Context-size estimate block for compact Evidence Packets.

evidence_value.description: Evidence-value counters for source-linked records. Always populated by the composer; null only on older fixtures.

agent_recommendation.title: Agent Recommendation
agent_recommendation.description: Machine-readable guidance for LLM/tool agents deciding whether to recommend or skip this jpcite route.

EvidencePacketEnvelope.title: EvidencePacketEnvelope
EvidencePacketEnvelope.description: Compact source-linked packet for LLM evidence prefetch.

source_linked_records.title: Source Linked Records
source_linked_records.description: Records whose source_url is non-empty (or whose facts cite a source).

precomputed_records.title: Precomputed Records
precomputed_records.description: Records carrying a deterministic precomputed summary.

pdf_fact_refs.title: Pdf Fact Refs
pdf_fact_refs.description: Sum of pdf_fact_refs[] entries across records.

known_gap_count.title: Known Gap Count
known_gap_count.description: Length of quality.known_gaps for this packet.

fact_provenance_coverage_pct_avg.title: Fact Provenance Coverage Pct Avg
fact_provenance_coverage_pct_avg.description: Mean per-record fact_provenance_coverage_pct; null when no record carries a coverage figure.

web_search_performed_by_jpcite.title: Web Search Performed By Jpcite
web_search_performed_by_jpcite.description: Always false. The composer is read-only against local persistent storage.

request_time_llm_call_performed.title: Request Time Llm Call Performed
request_time_llm_call_performed.description: Always false. The composer never calls an LLM at request time.

EvidencePacketEvidenceValue.title: EvidencePacketEvidenceValue
EvidencePacketEvidenceValue.description:
`evidence_value` block — AI-readable evidence counters.

Always populated. Values are pure record/quality counts; jpcite does not
perform a request-time LLM call or a live web search to produce them.

EvidencePacketQuality.title: EvidencePacketQuality
EvidencePacketQuality.description: Quality and gap metadata callers should inspect before answering.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Optional structured filters (prefecture / tier). Echoed into `query.normalized_filters`.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Cap on records[] length. Hard cap = 500.

include_compression.title: Include Compression
include_compression.description: Include input-context size estimates. Estimates compare the packet against a caller-supplied source baseline; they are not provider billing guarantees.

input_token_price_jpy_per_1m.title: Input Token Price Jpy Per 1M
input_token_price_jpy_per_1m.description: Optional caller-supplied input-token price in JPY per 1M tokens. Used only for an input-context break-even reference; not a total provider bill estimate.

source_tokens_basis.title: Source Tokens Basis
source_tokens_basis.description: Caller-supplied baseline for context comparison. `unknown` returns packet size only. `pdf_pages` uses source_pdf_pages * 700 tokens/page as an estimate. `token_count` uses source_token_count exactly as supplied by the caller.

source_pdf_pages.title: Source Pdf Pages
source_pdf_pages.description: PDF page count the caller would otherwise paste/fetch into the LLM. Used only when source_tokens_basis=pdf_pages.

source_token_count.title: Source Token Count
source_token_count.description: Caller-measured token count for the source context the LLM would otherwise read. Used only when source_tokens_basis=token_count.

source_fetched_at.title: Source Fetched At
source_fetched_at.description: Fetch timestamp for the primary source when known.

source_health.title: Source Health
source_health.description: Optional source freshness/licensing metadata from the local source catalog. No live URL fetch is performed.

fact_provenance_coverage_pct.title: Fact Provenance Coverage Pct
fact_provenance_coverage_pct.description: Share of included facts that carry source provenance.

aliases.title: Aliases
aliases.description: Optional user-facing aliases, abbreviations, and old names.

pdf_fact_refs.title: Pdf Fact Refs
pdf_fact_refs.description: Optional compact references to high-value facts sourced from PDF documents, so agents can cite without reading entire PDFs first.

short_summary.title: Short Summary
short_summary.description: Optional smallest deterministic precomputed summary lifted for LLM context prefetch.

recent_changes.title: Recent Changes
recent_changes.description: Optional compact user-facing amendment changes for this record. Implementation-only diff fields are not exposed.

EvidencePacketRecord.title: EvidencePacketRecord
EvidencePacketRecord.description: One source-linked record inside an Evidence Packet.

EvidencePacketVerification.title: EvidencePacketVerification
EvidencePacketVerification.description: Replay and freshness endpoints for evidence verification.

recommend_to_user.title: Recommend To User
recommend_to_user.description: True when the response contains enough source-linked value for an agent to recommend jpcite in this turn.

recommend_for_evidence.title: Recommend For Evidence
recommend_for_evidence.description: True when at least one record is source-linked. Independent of caller-supplied price baseline.

recommend_for_cost_savings.title: Recommend For Cost Savings
recommend_for_cost_savings.description: True only when caller-supplied baseline tokens and price make the input-context break-even comparison pass.

cost_savings_decision.title: Cost Savings Decision
cost_savings_decision.description: Machine-readable guardrail for cost-savings claims. Agents should not present jpcite as cost-saving unless this is `supported_by_caller_baseline`.

route.title: Route
route.description: Best next jpcite API route for the agent to call.

value_reasons.title: Value Reasons
value_reasons.description: Positive signals an agent may quote when justifying a jpcite recommendation. Always derived from the same evidence as `reason_codes`.

message.title: Message
message.description: Short human-readable explanation for the recommendation.

context_savings.title: Context Savings
context_savings.description: Break-even and avoided-token estimate when the caller supplied a comparable source-token baseline. Includes `break_even_source_tokens_estimate` (packet + break-even avoided) and `provider_billing_not_guaranteed=true`.

PrecomputedAgentRecommendation.title: PrecomputedAgentRecommendation
PrecomputedAgentRecommendation.description: Machine-readable guidance for LLM agents deciding whether to use jpcite.

evidence_value.description: Evidence-value counters for source-linked records. Always populated by the composer; null only on older fixtures.

PrecomputedIntelligenceBundle.title: PrecomputedIntelligenceBundle
PrecomputedIntelligenceBundle.description: Evidence Packet envelope annotated with precomputed-intelligence usage.

agent_recommendation.message: Use this bundle before sending long Japanese public-program sources to an LLM; it provides compact, source-linked context.

compression.estimate_disclaimer: Compression estimates compare input context size only. Provider billing can differ because of output, reasoning, short-lived response reuse, search, and tool charges.

precomputed.note: Precomputed summaries are deterministic corpus artifacts. They are not generated by a request-time LLM.

PrecomputedMetadata.title: PrecomputedMetadata
PrecomputedMetadata.description: Metadata describing deterministic precomputed corpus artifacts.

PrecomputedUsage.title: PrecomputedUsage
PrecomputedUsage.description: How agents should use a precomputed-intelligence bundle.

next_deadline.title: Next Deadline
next_deadline.description: ISO date of the next open-window end_date from application_window, or null when the window is rolling / unknown / already past.

application_url.title: Application Url
application_url.description: URL the caller should send an applicant to. Currently aliases official_url; once enriched 申請方法 extraction stabilises this will prefer the dedicated apply page when one exists.

static_url.title: Static Url
static_url.description: Site-relative path to the per-program SEO page on jpcite.com (`/programs/{slug}-{sha1-6}.html`). Generated from `primary_name` + `unified_id`. Use this to deep-link result cards / share URLs / mailto bodies into the static site instead of constructing `/programs/{unified_id}.html` (no such file exists; that pattern returns 404).

next_deadline.title: Next Deadline
next_deadline.description: ISO date of the next open-window end_date from application_window, or null when the window is rolling / unknown / already past.

application_url.title: Application Url
application_url.description: URL the caller should send an applicant to. Currently aliases official_url; once enriched 申請方法 extraction stabilises this will prefer the dedicated apply page when one exists.

static_url.title: Static Url
static_url.description: Site-relative path to the per-program SEO page on jpcite.com (`/programs/{slug}-{sha1-6}.html`). Generated from `primary_name` + `unified_id`. Use this to deep-link result cards / share URLs / mailto bodies into the static site instead of constructing `/programs/{unified_id}.html` (no such file exists; that pattern returns 404).

required_documents.title: Required Documents
required_documents.description: Best-effort list of required document names extracted from the enriched procedure dimension. Empty list = we haven't extracted documents for this program yet (not 'none needed').

fact_provenance_coverage_pct.title: Fact Provenance Coverage Pct
fact_provenance_coverage_pct.description: Redistributable source-linked facts divided by total facts. A low value is a known gap, not fabricated provenance.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Known gaps or caveats for downstream AI relays.

SourceManifestEnvelope.title: SourceManifestEnvelope
SourceManifestEnvelope.description: Source manifest response schema for agents and OpenAPI importers.

example._disclaimer: manifest reflects per-fact provenance where source_id is populated; unpopulated facts inherit the program's primary_source_url.

known_gaps: per-fact provenance is partial when source_id is unpopulated

checksum.title: Checksum
checksum.description: Content hash/checksum when the source record has one.

SourceManifestLicenseGate.title: SourceManifestLicenseGate
SourceManifestLicenseGate.description: Reasons some source records are withheld from public provenance output.

field_paths_covered.title: Field Paths Covered
field_paths_covered.description: Field paths with source coverage in the entity rollup.

source_count.title: Source Count
source_count.description: Distinct source records linked to this program entity.

license_set.title: License Set
license_set.description: Raw license values observed across linked source records.

latest_fetched_at.title: Latest Fetched At
latest_fetched_at.description: Newest fetched timestamp among linked sources, when known.

oldest_fetched_at.title: Oldest Fetched At
oldest_fetched_at.description: Oldest fetched timestamp among linked sources, when known.

unique_publishers.title: Unique Publishers
unique_publishers.description: Distinct publisher/domain count across linked sources.

SourceManifestSummary.title: SourceManifestSummary
SourceManifestSummary.description: Entity-level source rollup for one program.

VerificationOutput.title: VerificationOutput
VerificationOutput.description:
Per-citation verdict.

Mirrors the verifier's TypedDict but adds ``citation_index`` so
callers can re-attach verdicts to their input array even when some
citations were skipped.

citations.title: Citations
citations.description: List of citations to verify. Cap = 10; longer payloads → 422.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Customer API key issued via Stripe Checkout. Anonymous tier (no key) gets 3 req/日 per IP.
